analysis.object: T705: Motivic Cohomology Bridge depth analysis

motivic_depth.description: Motivic cohomology H^n_M(X,Z(p)): EML depth = p (the twist parameter is EML depth)
motivic_depth.reason: Motivic cohomology depth: twist p is EML depth; H^n_M(X,Z(p)) lives at EML-p

comparison_map.description: Motivic-to-Hodge comparison map: depth-preserving; EML-p motivic -> EML-p/2 Hodge by integration
comparison_map.reason: Comparison map is depth-halving: motivic depth p -> Hodge weight p/2; Deltad=-p/2

k_theory_transfer.description: Algebraic K-theory lives at EML-1 (exponential growth of projective modules); transfers via motivic
k_theory_transfer.reason: K-theory transfer: EML-1 K-theory results map to EML-3 motivic via Bloch-Kato; motivic maps to Hodge

regulator_eml2.description: Beilinson regulator: motivic -> Deligne cohomology; EML-2 measurement of EML-3 motivic class
regulator_eml2.reason: Beilinson regulator is EML-2: measurement map from motivic (EML-3) to Deligne cohomology (EML-2)
